'''Pao-Neh-Lo''' was an experienced [[Tiss'shar]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]. She was cold-hearted and showed little mercy but was highly disciplined and would follow a strong leader to the end. Like most of her species, she wore no clothes apart from a tool harness from which she hung weapons. Pao-Neh-Lo had an impressive array of weapons including a [[Power 5 heavy blaster pistol]], [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]], [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]], [[Vibrodagger/Legends|vibrodagger]], [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]] and [[Detonite/Legends|detonite]].<ref name="Orbit" />

While on [[StarForge Station]] Pao-Neh-Lo responded to a call by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dhas Fenoep Vedij|Dhas Vedij]] to join the crew of the [[Rebel privateer]] vessel [[Far Orbit]].<ref name="Orbit" />
